title: euphorbia deltoidea var. adhaerens
intro: Euphorbia deltoidea var. adhaerens, also known as the "Milk Bush" or "Gila Ghost", is a succulent plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective against infections and wounds. The health benefits of Euphorbia deltoidea var. adhaerens include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from fever and pain. The plant can be prepared as a salve or ointment by infusing the sap in a carrier oil, allowing for topical application and providing relief from various health issues.
